If water springs up from the earth that has not been dug, if
water acquires a different smell or taste, and if some unnatural
features are seen in tanks etc., there will be great disaster. The
following is the expiatory method to be adopted in the above cases.
ftrfq wSnre: i
^ ^ qrqgqqifir
When any unnatural feature is observed with respect to water
Varuna should be worshipped with Vedic hymns relating to Him
and with the same hymns Japa (mental repetition) and Homa
(offering of oblations to the sacred fire) should be performed. By
doing so, the sin (evil) can be warded off.
(7) Portents of Births
^ 11 K. ^ 11
When women give birth to monstrocities, or two, three, four
or more children at a time, or when the birth happens to be toa
premature or over-delayed, ruin will befall the country and the
family.
Should mares, camels, she-buffaloes, cows and cow-
elephants bring forth twins, the former would meet with death. The
